About

Secure password generator. Adjustable length, character types, strength indicator.

Type: Standalone (works offline) · Developer: FreeAppStore

Privacy

Password collects zero data. No analytics, no tracking, no cookies. Nothing leaves your browser.

Open Source

Fully open source under the MIT license. Inspect the code, report bugs, or contribute improvements.
